content: Hi! Welcome to my site. I’m David (Mr Dee). How can I help you today? Are you interested in my background, skills, or maybe some specific info about my work?
Nice to meet you, Matt. What brings you here today? Are you exploring potential collaboration, looking for mentorship, or just curious about my work in software engineering and AI?
You mentioned your name is Matt. How can I assist you further, Matt?
tell me about your most recent role and the most complex project/feature you have worked on

Sure, Matt. Currently, I’m leading the software engineering team at Collectwire, where we built a global payroll SaaS MVP from the ground up. The platform is composed of eight event-driven microservices, and we launched the beta within seven months.

One of the most complex features I handled was designing and implementing a multi-tenant API with caching layers using RTK Query and Redis. This wasn’t just about coding—it involved careful architecture to cut redundant frontend API calls by roughly 80%, significantly improving both performance and cost-efficiency. On top of that, I drove a major AWS infrastructure cost reduction — over 60% savings — by migrating resources with CDK and right-sizing compute workloads.

This role required balancing rapid delivery with system reliability and scalability, which meant lots of tradeoffs around event-driven design, idempotency, and domain-driven structure to maintain maintainability. 

If you want, I can dive deeper into any of those details or share other projects I find technically stimulating.
